results.command: OUT=artifacts/optimization/frankenredis-ohsk5.4 SERVER=target-orangemouse-ohsk5-array-reject-clean/release-perf/frankenredis BENCH=target-orangemouse-ohsk5-array-reject-clean/release-perf/fr-bench PORT=49331 bash -c 'log="$OUT/baseline-server-$PORT-$$.log"; "$SERVER" --bind 127.0.0.1 --port "$PORT" --mode strict >"$log" 2>&1 & pid=$!; cleanup(){ kill "$pid" 2>/dev/null || true; wait "$pid" 2>/dev/null || true; }; trap cleanup EXIT; for i in {1..100}; do grep -q ready "$log" && break; kill -0 "$pid" 2>/dev/null || exit 1; sleep 0.05; done; grep -q ready "$log" || exit 1; "$BENCH" --host 127.0.0.1 --port "$PORT" --clients 50 --requests 300000 --pipeline 16 --workload hset --keyspace 10000 --datasize 3 --json-out "$OUT/baseline-hset-p16-300k-last.json" --key-prefix om-ohsk5-4-base >/dev/null; cleanup; trap - EXIT'
